summary_text: **Findings (by severity)** - **Critical: existing auto-approval path directly violates `draft-only`.** `AUTO_APPROVE_ENABLED=True` and `auto_generator` promotes generated posts to `approved` (`pillar in (1,2)` with source). Any new candidate path that reuses this flow will leak into publish queue. References: [config.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/config.py#L105), [auto_generator.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/auto_generator.py#L558), [auto_generator.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/auto_generator.py#L569) - **Critical: Notion create path currently writes `Status` and `Scheduled` from record payload by default.** `push_new_to_notion()` calls `_post_record_to_notion_properties()` with default flags, which include status/schedule. If candidate records carry slot values, you are implicitly scheduling at create-time. References: [notion_sync.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py#L331), [notion_sync.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py#L343), [notion_sync.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py#L349), [notion_sync.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py#L606) - **Critical: current generator pre-allocates scheduler slots before human review.** `_prepare_generated_posts()` assigns `scheduled_for` via `_next_available_slots()`. This is incompatible with “draft rows only, no slot mutation.” References: [auto_generator.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/auto_generator.py#L347), [auto_generator.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/auto_generator.py#L422), [auto_generator.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/auto_generator.py#L454) - **High: quote URL handling in current generator conflicts with repo contract.** Current code appends quote URL into `text`. Contract requires X URLs in `Source URLs`/reply flow, not body. References: [auto_generator.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/auto_generator.py#L466), [auto_generator.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/auto_generator.py#L471), [x-auto-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L33) - **High: no hard provenance/primary-source gate in generation path.** Candidate accepts any `https://` source and can proceed without source at all (still drafted). For your stated model, this enables unverifiable X-only drafts. References: [auto_generator.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/auto_generator.py#L432), [auto_generator.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/auto_generator.py#L461) - **High: scheduler side effects become dangerous if any accidental status promotion occurs.** Scheduler pulls Notion SoT, backfills slots, and processes due approved jobs; accidental `approved` from generator will be operationalized quickly. References: [scheduler.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L429), [scheduler.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L485), [scheduler.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L514) - **Medium: duplicate checks are mostly lexical and depend on `logs/posted.json`.** Missing or sparse history weakens dedupe; semantic-duplicate thesis leakage risk remains for draft explosion workflows. References: [duplicate_guard.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/duplicate_guard.py#L56), [post_generator.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_generator.py#L339) --- **Hard invariants (must enforce in code)** - Candidate generator may only create new Notion rows with `Status=draft`. - Candidate generator must never set `Scheduled`, `Tweet ID`, `Posted At`, `Force Post`, `auto_approved`. - Candidate generator must never mutate existing non-draft rows (`approved`, `posting`, `posted`). - Quote-source URLs must not appear in body text; body URL exception allowed only for `note.com` lead mode. - Every candidate must carry provenance metadata: trigger URL, author handle, retrieved timestamp, extraction confidence. - Every candidate must have at least one primary source URL; otherwise reject candidate creation. - Notion remains write authority; local/supabase mirrors cannot overwrite candidate content/schedule fields. - Fixed slots and Mon/Thu 06:50 reservation c...
